speaker: MATT
raw_text: The door to this side suddenly swings open, and a beast begins to lumber out, chains detaching from manacles on two of its tethered, large tentacle-like arms. This grayish-brown mass, probably close to 15 feet in height, with a giant mouth filled with teeth and a large tongue that lolls off the side. Three tendrils reach off of it as these large, heavy feet pull it forward. Smell wafts around it of feces and rot. I need all of you to roll initiative, as this creature emerges right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Would I have been able to cast a spell as we are pushed forward into all this mess?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Blur, all right. You have a Blur spell on right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Put me behind that wall, yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, where did the monster come out of?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys entered from this side over here, and you saw the monster enter from this space.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Matt, I take that back. I'm not going to cast Blur. Sorry, my apologies.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What do you want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Can I do that on the other one, opposite her?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: As close to the center as is possible.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will be behind the pillar over there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, this one over-- yes, thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That, I think, is the door where it opens.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It could be anywhere, to be fair.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The emcee disappears and vanishes into the back. You guys all take a quiet moment, looking around you in silence. As the audience gets quiet, still, you can see hundreds and hundreds of faces all staring, strangely formless when it's a cloud like this in all directions, little beams of light peeking through the clouds, hitting the sand and dirt on the ground before you. In that quiet, you hear (slamming). You glance around briefly and see not one, but two doors seem to have opened.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Only one of them has a creature that emerges. It seems like they're playing mind games with you so you don't know where it's coming--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Next to Nott. All righty, I need you all to roll initiative. (screaming)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That was intense. Would we be able to have fought those two minotaurs?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Focus on one target at a time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Let us greet back to the field, The Mighty Nein!" The doors open once more.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. Where do you guys wish to be placed?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is it possible to climb up on one of the walls?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to try and climb up on top of the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an athletics check real fast.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Am I able to take a potion of healing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's really good. This one, sure. Why not.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll back up into that far corner.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Dead center. I'm going to cast Mage Hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to stand by Caleb, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. As you guys all take your place, two gates immediately open again. You hear two sources of this loud, deep (howling). Leaping through both sides, you see two massive, white furred wolves come leaping through into a full sprint.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I Invoke Duplicity in the middle of the-- next to Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From this side and this side here. You Invoke Duplicity?
